reviews.review_title: I’m in love with my demon wife, but…
reviews.review_description:
I love this game, I bought it on a whim and didn’t even know what I was getting myself into, this game isn’t a single genre.. this is a Tim burton horror comedy which isn’t just one type of game, it’s a brilliant boomer shooter, and awesome horror game and intriguing puzzler and a story driven but non linear game, Id recommend the devs fix the issue the game clearly has (occasionally ui issue, after the initial exit to the cave remembering after a reset locked you in the cave with no exit screen coming up to leave also to fix this you restart the day by save and exiting.
) but other than that this has been a brilliant experience so far and has helped my humble little channel to grow as I love boomer shooters and horror as well as comedy, this is a recommended title from me.
